---
title: "My HW2 for DACS 690V Spring"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

## Intro {.sidebar}

Author: Patrick McGrath<br>DACSS690V Spring 2026


## Row {data-height="500"}

### **THREE-GEAR CARS ARE DOMINANT** 

```{r}
## for del1Draft.rds
#https://github.com/DACSS690VMcGrath/Homeworks/blob/main/gear_plot.rds
link1="https://github.com/DACSS690VMcGrath/Homeworks/raw/main/gear_plot.rds"
readRDS(url(link1))
```

### **FEW CARS have SIX or more CARBURATORS**

```{r}
## for del2Draft.rds
#link2=""
link2="https://github.com/DACSS690VMcGrath/Homeworks/raw/main/carb_plot.rds"
readRDS(url(link2))
```

## Row {data-height="500"}

### **Only 5-gear cars utilize the 6 and 8 carburator setups.**

```{r}
## for del3Draft.rds
#link3=""
link3="https://github.com/DACSS690VMcGrath/Homeworks/raw/main/cyl_dist_plot.rds"
readRDS(url(link3))
```
